calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2008 Off Calendar

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-04-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Continued To Jan-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Apperances
Plaintiffs, Cecilia Tsu and Joseph Tsu, are present in propria persona.

Defendant, Aldo Andres Marega, is present in propria persona.

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 to put the terms of the settlement on the record. The parties are sworn. Judge Pro Tem recites the terms of the settlement on the record as follows:

Plaintiffs waive to receive payments from defendant for the January 2006 rent in the sum of $450.00, the $20.00 monthly parking fee from October 2006 through December 2007, and the unlawful detainer cost in the sum of $345.00, for a total waiver of payments in the sum of $1,095.00. Defendant waive to receive from plaintiffs any claims on the over payment of rent. Defendant agrees to pay plaintiffs, as and for rent due at the rate of $425.00 per month, for the months of 9/15, 10/15, 11/15, and 12/15 of 2007, for a total rent of $1,700.00. Said amount shall be payable to plaintiffs on a check and defendant shall not stop any payments. Defendant agrees to move out on or before January 1, 2008. There is no rent due from December 17, 2007 to January 1, 2008. Defendant to pay plaintiffs, as and for utilities bills and for settlement of the Small Claims Appeals, case number CSM-07-820948, the sum of $389.75. Upon payment, plaintiff will file a dismissal in the Small Claims Appeals. Defendant to pay the sum of $150.00 to be held by plaintiffs, along with the $150.00 security deposit, for unpaid utility bills for the months of October, November and December of 2007. Any balance remaining is to be refunded to the defendant. The Court retains jurisdiction pursuant to section 664.6.

The case is continued to Monday, January 7, 2007, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 206 for trial. No appearance is required if a dismissal is filed with the court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSEPH TSU IN PRO PER
LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY MAIRI MCKEEVER FOR/WITH DEFENDANT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. NO SETTLEMENT REACHED. TRIAL DATE MAINTAINED.
